scholarships.name: Central Sector Scheme of Scholarships for College and University Students (CSSS)
scholarships.eligibility: Meritorious Class 12 students pursuing UG/PG courses

scholarships.name: National Means-cum-Merit Scholarship (NMMS)
scholarships.eligibility: Meritorious students studying in Classes 9–12 from low-income families

scholarships.name: PM YASASVI Scholarship
scholarships.eligibility: OBC, EBC and DNT students meeting income criteria

scholarships.name: AICTE Pragati Scholarship
scholarships.eligibility: Girl students pursuing AICTE-approved technical education

scholarships.name: AICTE Saksham Scholarship
scholarships.eligibility: Students with benchmark disabilities pursuing technical education

scholarships.name: AICTE Swanath Scholarship
scholarships.eligibility: Orphans, children of martyrs, and eligible vulnerable students

scholarships.name: PM-USP Special Scholarship for J&K and Ladakh
scholarships.eligibility: Students from Jammu, Kashmir and Ladakh

scholarships.name: National Fellowship and Scholarship for ST Students
scholarships.eligibility: Scheduled Tribe students pursuing higher education

scholarships.name: Top Class Education Scheme for SC Students
scholarships.eligibility: SC students admitted to premier institutions

scholarships.name: Top Class Education Scheme for OBC, EBC and DNT Students
scholarships.eligibility: OBC, EBC and DNT students admitted to premier institutions

scholarships.name: Top Class Education Scheme for Students with Disabilities
scholarships.eligibility: Students with benchmark disabilities studying in top institutions

scholarships.name: Post Matric Scholarship for Students with Disabilities
scholarships.eligibility: Students with disabilities studying after Class 10

scholarships.name: Pre Matric Scholarship for Students with Disabilities
scholarships.eligibility: Students with disabilities studying in school

scholarships.name: Merit-cum-Means Scholarship for Professional and Technical Courses
scholarships.eligibility: Minority students pursuing professional and technical courses

scholarships.name: Pre Matric Scholarship for Minorities
scholarships.eligibility: Minority students studying in school

scholarships.name: Post Matric Scholarship for Minorities
scholarships.eligibility: Minority students studying after Class 10

scholarships.name: INSPIRE Scholarship
scholarships.eligibility: Top-performing science students pursuing higher education

scholarships.name: Ishan Uday Scholarship
scholarships.eligibility: Students from North Eastern states pursuing higher education

scholarships.name: Prime Minister's Scholarship Scheme (PMSS)
scholarships.eligibility: Children of ex-servicemen and defence personnel

scholarships.name: Begum Hazrat Mahal National Scholarship
scholarships.eligibility: Meritorious minority girl students
